title: Lovely Grassy Mexican Comte Tacos
description: A high-protein Mexican dish featuring Comte cheese, miso-marinated chicken, and fresh grassy flavors, perfect for a special occasion.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together miso paste, lime juice, and olive oil to make the marinade.
Add the chicken pieces to the marinade and mix well to coat.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Remove the chicken from the marinade and cook until browned and cooked through.
Warm the tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the tacos by placing a piece of chicken onto a tortilla, followed by a sprinkle of Comte cheese, cilantro, and green onions.
Garnish with additional cilantro and green onions if desired.
